opening_hours: Local shrine hours can vary. Daytime is usually the easiest time for a calm visit.

description.en: A central guardian-spirit shrine and one of the clearest short sacred stops inside the city core.
description.nl: Een centrale guardian-spirit-schrijn en een van de duidelijkste korte heilige stops in de stadskern.

metaTitle.en: Surat Thani City Pillar Shrine | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Surat Thani City Pillar Shrine | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Surat Thani City Pillar Shrine is one of the city's most useful central sacred landmarks.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom de Surat Thani City Pillar Shrine een van de nuttigste centrale heilige landmarks van de stad is.

enhanced_description:
The city-pillar makes sense as part of Surat Thani's urban core, not as a standalone long detour. It is one of the few central landmarks that still gives the city a clear sacred reference point close to the old-town and market layer.

This is why it belongs in the edited city route: a short, meaningful stop that adds cultural structure without pretending to be a half-day destination.
detailed_history: TAT still maintains the City Pillar Shrine as an official Surat Thani attraction, which is enough to treat it as the city's core guardian-spirit landmark rather than as decorative filler.
visitor_experience: Expect a respectful short shrine stop rather than a large temple complex. It works best when folded into the city-core walk, especially on a first day in town.

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Easy by short city ride or while moving between the old-town and market layer.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Talat Lang, the 100-Year Arch Bridge, and Talad San Chao.
practical_info.food_options: Best paired with old-town breakfast or an evening market route.
practical_info.shopping: Not a shopping stop; keep the focus on the shrine and nearby streets.

insider_tips: It fits naturally into the same block as the old-town walk.
Do not overbuild it into more than it is.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on TAT's official attraction listing and the broader Surat Thani city-core structure.
cultural_significance: The shrine anchors Surat Thani's city-center spiritual layer and helps keep the route tied to local civic identity rather than pure transport logic.

contentSources.name: The City Pillar Shrine, Surat Thani
